raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "dark (brown) box (left box)",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both arms can reach the left and right side faces of the dark box; the light box and the cup are not contacting the dark box’s side faces; there is enough lateral clearance to place both palms against the box without colliding with the neighboring objects.",
    "Postcondition": "The dark box is constrained from both sides and prevented from sliding while the robot prepares a secure lift."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "dark (brown) box (left box)",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The box is stabilized; both end-effectors are aligned to opposing side faces at mid-height; the lift direction (upward) is unobstructed and the cup is clear of the box footprint so it will not be struck during lift-off.",
    "Postcondition": "The dark box is securely held in a two-hand pinch grasp and is no longer resting on the table."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: Both arms can reach the left and right side faces of the dark box; the light box and the cup are not contacting the dark box’s side faces; there is enough lateral clearance to place both palms against the box without colliding with the neighboring objects.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The dark box is constrained from both sides and prevented from sliding while the robot prepares a secure lift.

parsed_json.Precondition: The box is stabilized; both end-effectors are aligned to opposing side faces at mid-height; the lift direction (upward) is unobstructed and the cup is clear of the box footprint so it will not be struck during lift-off.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The dark box is securely held in a two-hand pinch grasp and is no longer resting on the table.
